title: North Korea Attempts Missile Launch Near Sinpo Explodes Immediately After Liftoff
summary: North Korea launches missile near Sinpo at 5:51 a.m. local time. Missile explodes immediately post-liftoff. US Pacific Command detects and tracks failed attempt.
contents:
## North Korea Attempts Missile Launch Near Sinpo Explodes Immediately After Liftoff

### Overview
North Korea launches missile near Sinpo at 5:51 a.m. local time. Missile explodes immediately post-liftoff. US Pacific Command detects and tracks failed attempt.

### Event Details
North Korea attempts missile launch near Sinpo on Sunday morning. US officials report explosion occurs immediately after liftoff at 5:51 a.m. local time, equivalent to 11:21 a.m. Hawaii time on April 15. U.S. Pacific Command spokesman Commander David Benham confirms detection and tracking of ballistic missile. Launch happens amid celebrations for North Korea's founder birthday. US Vice President Mike Pence labels action provocation during speech to US military members in Seoul. South Korean Foreign Ministry issues strong condemnation, noting violation of UN Security Council resolutions. Ministry warns North Korea faces punitive consequences if pursues nuclear experiment or ICBM launch. Government discusses measures with related countries. Concerns mount over potential sixth nuclear test or significant rocket launch, including first ICBM flight test. Festivities continue despite heightened tensions on Korean Peninsula. US officials monitor situation closely. South Korea heightens alert status in response. International community expresses alarm over repeated provocations. North Korea persists with missile development program despite failures. US Pacific Command maintains vigilance in region. Joint responses from allies strengthen deterrence posture.

### Source Context
@KC_NWT (KC NWT) covers this category of developments. The account focuses on korea security military dprk rok exercise alert provocation.
